name: gstack
description: Garry's Stack — Claude Code skills + fast headless browser. One repo, one install, entire AI engineering workflow.

scripts.build: bun build browse/src/cli.ts --outfile browse/dist/browse.mjs --target=node --format=esm && bun build browse/src/server.ts --outfile browse/dist/server.mjs --target=node --format=esm --external playwright --external playwright-core --external diff --external better-sqlite3
